# Yuzhu Zhang

> Data product consultant and AI enablement practitioner based in Berlin. Helps teams adopt AI tools, build data fluency, and turn data into useful products.

## Pages

- [Home](https://yuzhuz.github.io/): Background, consulting services, interests, recent writing
- [About](https://yuzhuz.github.io/about.html): Career background, education, personal philosophy
- [Portfolio](https://yuzhuz.github.io/portfolio.html): Data product and AI enablement case studies (coming soon)
- [Blog](https://yuzhuz.github.io/blog.html): Articles on data product management, AI tools, and working practices

## Posts

- [How to build a GitHub Pages site for team docs with AI](https://yuzhuz.github.io/posts/github-pages-team-docs-ai.html): How to replace Confluence with a GitHub Pages site in 30 minutes using Claude Code, including real automation examples (Google Sheet sync, Slack integration)

## Key facts

- Based in Berlin, Germany
- Services: data product consulting, AI enablement, product strategy workshops
- Background: advertising, logistics, pricing — revenue manager, analyst, product manager
- Current role: Senior Data Product Manager at Kleinanzeigen.de
- Education: Hertie School of Governance (MPP), Humboldt University Berlin, Beijing Foreign Studies University
- Languages: Mandarin, German, English
- Contact: yuzhu.zhang@outlook.de
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuzhuzhang/
